patch.summary: Updates fields od crop unit (cropUnitName, colorHexCode, irrigationBlocks)

get.summary: Gets a specific irrigation blocks by Farm Id

put.summary:
Updates multiple irrigation blocks in bulk, identified by their Ids.
Ensures that all provided blocks belong to the same farm and that the user is authorized.

requestBody.description: A list of irrigation blocks to update. Each item contains the irrigation block Id and the updated data.

post.summary:
Edit a stage and/or a season by supplying key-value data
Be aware that the IrrigationBlockId from the request is currently being ignored and is expected to be used at a later stage.

include.description: List of strings of data to include

IncludedData.description: Holds an array of comma separated values from query strings

Bearer.description:
JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme. 

 
                      Enter 'Bearer' [space] and then your token in the text input below.
                      

Example: 'Bearer 12345abcdef'
Bearer.name: Authorization
